parameters.responseBody:
={
  "success": true,
  "action": "already_activated",
  "message": "Tool {{ $json.tool_id }} was already activated by this user on {{ $json.existing_activated_at }}. No action taken.",
  "user_id": "{{ $json.user_id }}",
  "tool_id": "{{ $json.tool_id }}",
  "tool_name": {{ JSON.stringify($json.tool_data.name) }},
  "first_activated_at": "{{ $json.existing_activated_at }}"
}

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "user_id": "{{ $json.user_id }}",
  "type": "tool_tip",
  "title": "{{ $json.tool_data.emoji }} First time using {{ $json.tool_data.name }}?",
  "message": {{ JSON.stringify($json.tool_data.tip) }},
  "metadata": {{ JSON.stringify({ tool_id: $json.tool_id, quick_wins: $json.tool_data.quick_wins, estimated_time: $json.tool_data.estimated_time, first_action: $json.tool_data.first_action }) }},
  "action_label": "Got it",
  "action_url": null,
  "read": false,
  "created_at": "{{ $json.now }}"
}
